name: jaunt
description: Build and maintain Jaunt spec-driven Python and TypeScript projects with guarded generated files, workspace-aware status, and CLI-backed workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build Python and TypeScript Jaunt specs
interface.longDescription: Use Jaunt from Codex with workspace-aware Python and TypeScript build, conversion, doctor, and first-build review workflows. Bundled hooks report both targets and block direct edits to generated implementations, mirrors, sidecars, tests, and provenance-headed stubs.
defaultPrompt: Check this Python or TypeScript Jaunt workspace before I edit a spec.
Build the stale Jaunt targets and verify their native tests.
Run Jaunt doctor and check the TypeScript toolchain.
